bodyHtml:
Specification

Product Specification Sheet

A parameter-focused reference for early technical comparison of AI optical sorting models and integrated construction waste line configurations.

Type: Technical sheet Updated: 2026-06-30 Buyer fit: Engineering and EPC review Review time: 12 min

What this resource covers

  • Capacity, footprint, power, and model comparison references
  • Sorting scope for plastic recycling applications
  • Configuration notes for construction waste recycling lines
  • Questions that require project-specific confirmation before final quotation

When to use this resource

Use this sheet when your engineering team needs a compact technical reference for internal comparison before requesting a tailored layout or quotation.

Request this resource

Related resources

Compare equipment direction

Move between product lines and request more detailed engineering support when project inputs are ready.
